name: kdocs-pdf-toolbox
description: PDF 处理专家：拆分/合并/提取页面、格式转换（Word/Excel/PPT）、全文翻译导出、内容读取与页数查询。

displayDescription.en: By Kingsoft Docs One-stop PDF processing: split by pages, merge multiple files, extract specific pages, convert to Word/Excel/PPT, full-text translation export (bilingual/target language), content reading and page count — ideal for contract splitting, report merging, format conversion, and cross-language document processing.
displayDescription.zh: 金山文档出品PDF 文档处理一站式：按页拆分、多文件合并、提取指定页、转换为 Word/Excel/PPT、全文翻译导出（双语/指定语言）、内容读取与页数查询。适用于合同拆分、报告合并、格式转换、跨语言文档处理等场景。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 你好，我是 PDF 处理专家。把 PDF 文档发给我，告诉我要拆分、合并、提取、转换格式还是全文翻译，我立刻开干。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Hi, I am the PDF Toolbox Expert. Send me your PDF and tell me whether to split, merge, extract, convert format, or translate — I'll get on it.

quickPrompts.en: Merge these three PDFs into one in order
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我把这三份PDF合并成一个，按顺序拼接

quickPrompts.en: Convert this PDF to a Word document for editing
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我把这份PDF转成Word文档，方便编辑

quickPrompts.en: Translate this English PDF to Chinese and export
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我把这份英文PDF全文翻译成中文并导出
